name: Tigray Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: the courage and sacrifice of the people of Tigray

description: A red field with a yellow triangle issuing from the hoist and a yellow eight-pointed Star of Solomon (with rays) toward the fly.
history: The Tigray Region is the northernmost regional state of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, established under the 1995 Constitution. The Star of Solomon and the colour scheme draw on the imperial Ethiopian heraldic tradition.

features.symbolism: the Solomonic dynasty and the Christian heritage of Tigray
